intro: Balsamea kataf, also known as Peruvian balsam, is a plant-based resin extracted from the Myroxylon peruiferum tree, native to South America. The resin has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, offering health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues and skin conditions.
